data.title: Investors are anticipating 2.5 rate cuts by the Federal Reserve in 2026, with the odds of a third cut by December at 45%. Traders are tilting towards a more accommodative policy direction post Jerome Powell's tenure expiration. Market expectations have shifted to a more dovish tone.
data.description: Market expectations for the Federal Reserve's policy in 2026 have shifted to a dovish tone, with investors anticipating approximately two and a half rate cuts next year. The CME FedWatch tool indicates that two cuts are fully expected, with a third cut having a meaningful probability. The likelihood of one cut by June and a second by September is high, while the odds of a third cut by December are around 45%. This repricing has coincided with speculation about Fed Chair Jerome Powell's potential replacement in May 2026 and the potential for a more accommodative policy from the next appointee under President Donald Trump. Polymarket's distribution shows that traders are leaning towards a base case of two to three cuts in 2026, with the possibility of further easing measures. The probabilities of no cuts or just one cut are minimal, suggesting a strong expectation for a more accommodative approach from the Fed in the coming year.

data.title: Build-A-Bear expands with new locations at American Dream and Mall of America in 2026 after successful LA debut.
data.description: In early 2026, two additional Workshops will be launched after the successful debut of the inaugural site in Los Angeles. Build-A-Bear Workshop, renowned for its unique retail concept that adds more heart to experiences, is expanding its reach. The new locations demonstrate the brand's growth following the initial success. This announcement comes after the company's collaboration with Sanrio®, a well-known lifestyle brand. The expansion reflects the positive reception, with anticipation of further growth and impact.

data.title: Long term care workers in Sydney, NS hold information picket on Dec 5, 2025 at Mayflower Mall to update expired contract.
data.description: Long-term care workers, represented by the Canadian Union of Public Employees (CUPE), are set to conduct an information picket outside the Mayflower Mall in Sydney. The picket, scheduled for December 5, 2025, from 2 PM to 4 PM at 800 Grand Lake Road, Sydney, aims to raise awareness for their bargaining efforts. The workers are seeking public support to update a contract that has been expired for nearly two years. The demonstration will feature members of CUPE advocating for fair negotiations and improved working conditions.

data.title: Endeavour Silver completes US$350 million offering of convertible senior notes due 2031, with initial conversion price of US$12.4550 per share.
data.description: Endeavour Silver Corp. ("Endeavour" or the "Company") completed its previously announced offering of US$350 million aggregate principal amount of 0.25% unsecured convertible senior notes due 2031 (the "Notes"). This amount includes the full exercise of the US$50 million option given to the initial purchasers of the Notes. The initial conversion rate for the Notes stands at 80.2890 common shares of the Company (the "Shares") per US$1,000 principal amount of Notes, translating to an initial conversion price of around US$12.4550 per Share.

data.title: Workday named Leader in 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Financial Planning Software for fourth year in a row.
data.description: In Pleasanton, California on December 4, 2025, Workday, Inc. (NASDAQ: WDAY), a prominent enterprise AI platform specializing in people, money, and agent management, has achieved the prestigious recognition of being labeled a Leader in the 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Financial Planning Software for the fourth consecutive year. This acknowledgment highlights Workday's consistent excellence and innovation in the industry.

data.title: Groups encourage Trump to avoid harming U.S.-Mexico-Canada trade pact as he threatens to exit it. Hearings raise concerns.
data.description: The hearings held in Washington this week highlighted concerns regarding the fate of the U.S.-Mexico-Canada trade agreement. There is growing anxiety over the possibility of the president deciding to terminate the deal.

data.title: Ledger now offers Uniswap (UNI) Trading API integration for secure and permissionless swaps, enhancing user access to onchain liquidity.
data.description: The integration of the Uniswap (UNI) Trading API by Ledger allows for secure and permissionless swaps within the Ledger Wallet. This integration provides users with enhanced control and access to onchain liquidity.
US BLS: Q3 2025 PRODUCTIVITY AND COSTS (PRELIMINARY) DATA TO BE RELEASED ON JAN. 8
BLS: US Employment Cost Index for Q4 2025 set for February 10th and US Q3 Productivity Report set for January 8th.

data.title: The Meadows releases first annual outcomes report showing significant improvements in patient well-being across treatment programs.
data.description: In Wickenburg, Arizona on December 4, 2025, The Meadows, an acclaimed provider of trauma, addiction, and mental health care services, unveiled its 2024 Annual Outcomes Report. This report showcases notable advancements in patient welfare throughout residential, outpatient, and other treatment settings. The data illustrates tangible improvements in overall well-being as a result of The Meadows' interventions.

data.title: ServiceNow University and MeasureUp partner to offer official practice tests for ServiceNow certifications worldwide.
data.description: ServiceNow University has recently partnered with MeasureUp to provide official practice tests for all ServiceNow certifications. This collaboration is set to enhance the certification process by offering professionals a more reliable and efficient pathway to achieving certification success. The agreement was announced in Miami on December 4, 2025. This collaboration marks a significant step towards standardizing and improving the certification process for individuals aiming to pursue ServiceNow certifications globally.

data.title: Lexington Manufacturing expands to Prineville, Oregon, enhancing its West Coast presence. Milestone in company's growth.
data.description: A company based in Coon Rapids, Minnesota, called Lexington Manufacturing, specializing in high-performance door and window components, has recently expanded into Prineville, Oregon. The move represents a significant milestone in the company's growth strategy as it aims to establish a presence in new markets. This expansion is expected to create employment opportunities and contribute to the local economy in Prineville.

data.title: Fox Advertising will hold 2026 upfront presentation on May 11 at NYC Center, featuring new premium content and ad tech.
data.description: The annual presentation for advertisers is scheduled for Monday, May 11 at the new location, the historic New York City Center. The event will feature a wide variety of original premium content from across the company's portfolio, as well as showcase the latest advancements in advertising technology. Tubi will host the IAB NewFront.
